items.headline: NVIDIA invests $2 billion in Nebius to expand AI cloud and Blackwell infrastructure capacity

items.why_it_matters: Large strategic capital commitments can rapidly reshape neocloud capacity, pricing power, and Blackwell deployment velocity.
